summary: Series Episode Registration Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. 17/17 backend tests passed. Frontend StoryVideoPipeline renders correctly without series context (heading='Create a Story Video', no series banner). Code review confirms _register_series_episode() function correctly implements upsert logic, updates episode_count, and is only called for SUCCESS_STATES.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py line 621: _register_series_episode() only called when target in SUCCESS_STATES and job.get('series_id') - CORRECT
pipeline.py line 631-713: _register_series_episode() function implements proper upsert logic
pipeline.py line 668-670: Checks for existing episode with find_one({'series_id': series_id, 'episode_number': episode_number})
pipeline.py line 675-682: If exists, updates existing record with update_one() - prevents duplicates
pipeline.py line 684-705: If not exists, creates new episode record with insert_one()
pipeline.py line 708-712: Updates series.episode_count after registration with count_documents()
story_engine_routes.py line 467-468: CreateEngineRequest model accepts optional series_id and episode_number fields
story_engine_routes.py line 583-590: POST /api/story-engine/create stores series_id and episode_number on job document
story_engine_routes.py line 756: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns series_id in response
universe_routes.py line 315-398: GET /api/universe/series/{id}/episodes endpoint with orphan job fallback
universe_routes.py line 341-363: Orphan job fallback finds story_engine_jobs with matching series_id not in story_episodes
universe_routes.py line 368-384: Episode lock status logic - is_locked, is_current, is_completed based on last_completed_num
StoryVideoPipeline.js line 270-279: Reads seriesContext from remix_data when source_tool='series-continue'
StoryVideoPipeline.js line 553-558: Passes series_id and episode_number in generation payload when seriesContext is set
StoryVideoPipeline.js line 1001-1013: Renders series context banner when seriesContext exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Series Episode Registration feature verified in iteration 395. Key findings: 1) _register_series_episode() function at pipeline.py line 631 correctly implements upsert logic to prevent duplicates; 2) Function only called for SUCCESS_STATES (READY/PARTIAL_READY), not for failed jobs; 3) Function updates series.episode_count after registration; 4) CreateEngineRequest model accepts series_id and episode_number fields; 5) POST /api/story-engine/create stores both fields on job document; 6) GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns series_id in response; 7) GET /api/universe/series/{id}/episodes has orphan job fallback that finds unregistered jobs; 8) Episodes endpoint returns correct is_current and locked status based on last completed episode; 9) Frontend StoryVideoPipeline passes series_id and episode_number in payload when seriesContext is set; 10) Frontend renders series context banner when series data present in remix_data.

_register_series_episode_creates_new_rec.details: Code review confirms function creates new story_episodes record when job with series_id completes (pipeline.py lines 684-705)

_register_series_episode_upsert_no_dupli.details: Code review confirms upsert logic: find_one() before insert, update_one() if exists (pipeline.py lines 668-682)

_register_series_episode_updates_episode.details: Code review confirms series.episode_count updated after registration (pipeline.py lines 708-712)

failed_jobs_no_registration.details: Code review confirms only SUCCESS_STATES trigger registration (pipeline.py line 621)

CreateEngineRequest_accepts_series_id.details: Backend test confirms series_id field accepted without 422 error

CreateEngineRequest_accepts_episode_numb.details: Backend test confirms episode_number field accepted without 422 error

create_endpoint_stores_series_fields.details: Code review confirms POST /api/story-engine/create stores series_id and episode_number (story_engine_routes.py lines 583-590)

status_endpoint_returns_series_id.details: Backend test confirms GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns series_id field

episodes_endpoint_orphan_fallback.details: Code review confirms GET /api/universe/series/{id}/episodes has orphan job fallback (universe_routes.py lines 341-363)

episodes_endpoint_lock_status.details: Code review confirms correct is_current and locked status based on last_completed_num (universe_routes.py lines 368-384)

no_duplicate_episodes.details: Code review confirms upsert pattern prevents duplicates for same series_id + episode_number

frontend_passes_series_context.details: Code review confirms StoryVideoPipeline.js passes series_id and episode_number in payload (lines 553-558)

frontend_renders_series_banner.details: Code review confirms series context banner renders when seriesContext exists (lines 1001-1013)

frontend_no_banner_without_context.details: Frontend test confirms no series banner shown when no series context

frontend_correct_heading_without_context.details: Frontend test confirms heading is 'Create a Story Video' without series context
